title: Sanvia Vitajuice Bar
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Sanvia Vitajuice Bar''' was a [[vitajuice]] bar on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. Its clientele consisted almost entire of [[Emente]]s, who liked to watch their food being prepared for them.

[[Mara Jade Skywalker]] and [[Kyp Durron]] drank here.

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
